title: fagara riedeliana
intro: Fagara riedeliana, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and analgesic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Fagara riedeliana is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
